nasb.text: O my God, my soul is in despair within me; Therefore I remember You from the land of the Jordan And the peaks of Hermon, from Mount Mizar.

esv.text: and my God. My soul is cast down within me; therefore I remember you from the land of Jordan and of Hermon, from Mount Mizar.

cnv.text: 我的心在我裡面沮喪； 因此我從約旦地，從黑門嶺， 從米薩山，記念你。

ccb.text: 我的上帝啊，我心中沮丧， 便在约旦河、黑门山和米萨山想起你。

csbs.text: 我的神哪，我的灵魂在我里面沮丧！ 因此我从约旦地、黑门岭、米萨山记念你。
